mapper.insert: INSERT INTO companion_requests ( post_id, user_id, message ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{userId}, #{message} )
mapper.select: SELECT cr.id, cr.post_id, cr.user_id, cr.message, cr.status, cr.created_at, u.user_id AS applicant_login_id, u.user_name, u.email FROM companion_requests cr JOIN users u ON cr.user_id = u.id WHERE cr.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY cr.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM companion_requests WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status = 'APPROVED'
